evals.prompt: 次の Carpentries エピソードファイルを日本語に翻訳してください。ファイルのパスは /Users/knishida/Documents/GitHub/skills/skills/carpentries_translation/evals/test_episode.Rmd です。翻訳結果を test_episode.ja.Rmd として同じディレクトリに保存してください。
evals.expected_output: Properly translated Japanese .Rmd file with all technical markup preserved exactly as-is, while all prose is translated to natural Japanese.

assertions.description: YAML frontmatter: source, teaching, exercises values are identical to source
YAML title: value is translated (not identical to English original 'Data visualization')
All ::: delimiter lines match the source exactly (colon count and class names)
R code inside all ```{r ...} blocks is identical to source
Chunk names and options (e.g., cache=FALSE, purl=TRUE) are identical to source
fig.alt string values are translated into the target language
All https:// URLs are identical to source
@Wilkinson:2005 citation is preserved exactly
Inline backtick content is unchanged
Narrative prose paragraphs are written in the target language
